title: columnea tulae var. tomentulosa
intro: Columnea tulae var. tomentulosa, also known as the fuzzy columnea or hairy columnea, is a variety of the Columnea tulae plant, a flowering plant species in the family Gesneriaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Columnea tulae var. tomentulosa are thought to include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, as well as potentially treating various skin conditions. The plant is typically prepared for medicinal use through herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are made by steeping the leaves in hot water or a solvent such as ethanol.
